reviews.review_description:
This game is really fun and entertaining. This game has some bugs but it does not kill the gameplay, and for me, a slendytubbies fan, getting a vr game with gtag mechanics and slendytubbies combinated is for sure an amazing idea.

Please keep on with the game, it great!

this is a very good game concept and i almost fainted when i saw this game and i instantly got it but as soon as i got into a lobby i got sent back to my meta home as soon as i finished getting my name written u. and now it just won't let me get back in the gam, it just kicks me back to my meta home and a lot of the reviews are saying the same thing, so Devs, if you're reading this, you need to patch that.

Of course it obviously sucks. The servers don’t work and everything but it’s an amazing idea and I would love to see it working. The Dev definitely did A great job with the idea, but the execution was poor. If they can get the servers￼ working and the monsters unstuck then I think we might have a true game on our hands. ￼

The game is REALLY good but the joining glitches and the monster glitches are annoying. Im saying if the developers lock in and actually try and update this game and listen to the community this could be the one of the best games on the platform 

Glitches Im talking about are the glitches when the Monster Kills you and you teleport outside the map, making private codes work, and making it easier to join lobbies

reviews.review_title: Really good game! Just needs some change
reviews.review_description:
First 2 things rq codes don’t work and there are issues with the map selector. Now to the good stuff, great idea, probably original idea, and great idea with the custards just now I think there should be like a story mode kinda like slendytubbies 3 that’s multiplayer and different dialogue changes gameplay like the actual game.

Anyways amazing game definitely has a lot of potential
this game is so good because it combines clouds gth but without the jumps cares kicking you and slendytubbies I'm also a big fan of clouds gth and slendytubbies so this game is a masterpiece

This game worked when i first downloaded it but now i get kicked for no reason when i try to join. Idk if i got banned but if i did idk what for cause i never did anything. Someone please fix this, others experience this too.
I do wish that the monsters were edited better and the maps were current

Fun No “what makes it unfun” im petrified half the time but the other half im searching for the next custard which just doesn’t exist but overall plenty maps horrid dread…can’t really have a say on the monsters the maps are to big so i didnt see any but the red on

reviews.review_title: It has a lot of potential
reviews.review_description: I like the idea of it and I like the feel of it, but I wish it ran a little better and that private server worked better. Also, I think it could benefit from working more on feel of the game

reviews.review_title: One if the best games i have ever played
reviews.review_description: This game is peak i love that its like the old slendy tubibes if i spelled that right i recommended this game and yes it has bugs but its still fun and playing with friends is very fun BTW dev if you are reading this please add cave map and cave tubibhe but w game keep up the good work
I never thought slendytubbies could be scary for me ngl. I WAS WRONG
I played every slendytubbies game so this is awesome to see in vr
I can't get in the game. It kicks me out after I join.

Words cannot express to you how much fun I’ve been having going around the 4 maps meeting people and having the time of my life I know this is in early access but I beg of you to keep it in the style of Slendytubbies, when I first played the game it reminds me of the 2017 Slendytubbies game and it brings me back to the past I LOVE IT!!!

ig its not THATTT bad, but it gets no updates and it would of been a lot more fun if they made it like slendytubbies 3 instead of a mix of 1 and 2. Also, i don't believe that mocuh guy ( i saw his review) cus how can you steal assets from a game that isnt even out yet, and its real, it looks better than this, but I dont understand.
The game is amazing but it needs like game modes
The game is good but getting the in-game money is hard and we need jump scares and make servers work but when they get that fixed this will be 5 stars

reviews.review_title: The game is good but i have issues
reviews.review_description: I love Teletubbies every time when I always die I just get out the map and once I go to the level that dipsy on I just get out of the map and go to Lala's map no hates at all
Wont let join kicks me out of game.

First off the concept for this game is awesome and had me excited but left me disappointed. You cant join private servers,the server system it self is janky and needs to be fixed and I dont exactly know where im going

horrible. The game is insanley laggy and just copied the slendytubbies monkies and called it a day. Like at least try to make a monster. And also, the playermodel is just straight up copied from my friends game. And HIS game was made in 2024. Just wait for his game to come out which is called "slendytubbers" trust me its WAY better then this game. If its even called a game.
A new revoke is coming and it's going to be better and no zeoworks stuff! I got the information on the discord server

reviews.review_title: Is a good game except for..
reviews.review_description: Well it is fun as a slendytubbies fan I liked it but it was very glitchy and some of the maps are bugged but if they fixed those issues and added survival/sandbox mode I would re install it

reviews.review_title: Good game, but a few bugs.
reviews.review_description: In outskirts, my flashlight doesn't work. It's just pitch black. Private codes don't work, I just get sent back into a public when I press enter. And a suggestion: Add mountains and caves  : D

it reminds me of when i was a little kid and watched slendytubbies for hours i cant wait to see what eles gets added
Insanely laggy. Tons of bugs. and computer doesn't work, if you want an good slendytubbies vr game wait for tubbers to release
did the best game but my view has a not letting me play this game anymor
Honestly, it's a 5. Ive loved slendytubbies ever since I was a kid, and it's mainly bc I love the concept of most of these games.

Ok first the game is great and all but there is some changes first the animation of the jumscare and every time it jumpscares it needs a custom jumpscare and when it jumpscares I always fall into the ground mostly of the time but I think you can fix on that great game recommend

reviews.review_title: Love the idea but very buggy.
reviews.review_description: So i really like slendytubbys, and i love the concept of a slendytubbys vr game. But it wont let me join codes, publics or privates, so the game would be amazing and id rate the game more if it weren't bugged.
It a good idea to make the game but it needs more updates and monster that what the real slendertubbie game have more monsters and more updates
The game is honestly fun but needs serious work done to it but atleast it reminds me of my childhood and therefore I will always like this game :)

this game is so fun 
 it kind of laggy but it's okay it's still fun even though it's laggy
I just think it needs a bit of an overhaul and an ability to check ages so little kids dont play
This game is really fun but if there is any devs PLEASE try to fix some of the glitches
Awesome game 🔥 🔥 🔥
Good game it has some bugs but it is really fun in my opinion just need more maps and some game modes.
